title: xyris calcicola
intro: Xyris calcicola, also known as the calcicole xyris or calcicole yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xyris calcicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Xyris calcicola can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
